raw_consumer_statement:
Purchase of a car XX/XX/year> on card. Barclays. {$9100.00}. Not aware of time limit for merchant dispute. Barclays claims that info is on my paper statements, which I don't receive. They also claim the info is on my electronic bill. We are setup for autopay. We don't receive an electronic statement. Bottomline, they have not informed me of anything.

Various merchantability issues have arisen with the car, leading me to conclude the sale on the card was fraudulent and deceptive. The merchantability test fails in this case.

I have been denied a merchant dispute option with Barclays based on their claim that the timeline has passed. They have failed to prove that I was ever made aware of that timeline. Therefore, I request a review if this matter. TY.
